label: ModelManager
documentation: Provides static methods for loading and uploading 3D models.

label: loadModel
documentation: Load a full OBJ model located in id. Returns a RawModel. If flipV is true, the texture's V axis will be mirrored (Required for OBJ exported from software like Blender).

label: loadModelParts
detail: ModelManager.loadModelParts(id: Identifier, flipV: boolean): Map<String, RawModel>
documentation: Load an OBJ model located in id. Returns a map of String & RawModel, each entry corresponding to an object group (or parts) in the OBJ file.

label: upload
documentation: Upload the model data to the GPU so it can be effectively rendered. Returns a Model. This should only be invoked during the Loading/Parsing stage.

label: loadRawModel
detail: ModelManager.loadRawModel(p1: null, id: Identifier, p2: null): RawModel
documentation: Deprecated. Equivalent to ModelManager.loadModel with flipV set to false.

label: loadPartedRawModel
detail: ModelManager.loadPartedRawModel(p1: null, id: Identifier, p2: null): Map<String, RawModel>
documentation: Deprecated. Equivalent to ModelManager.loadModelParts.

label: uploadVertArrays
documentation: Deprecated. Equivalent to ModelManager.upload.

label: RawModel
documentation: Represents the static data of a model (vertices, UVs, groups). Must be uploaded via ModelManager.upload() to be rendered.

label: RawModel
documentation: Create a new empty RawModel.

label: append
documentation: Append/combine another RawMesh to the current RawModel.

label: append
documentation: Append/combine another RawModel to the current RawModel.

label: applyTranslation
detail: RawModel.applyTranslation(x: float, y: float, z: float): void
documentation: Translate all vertices in the model by x, y and z.

label: applyRotation
documentation: Apply rotation to all vertices in a direction specified by a Vector3f. Angle is in degrees.

label: applyScale
detail: RawModel.applyScale(x: float, y: float, z: float): void
documentation: Scale the model relative to the model's origin.

label: applyMirror
detail: RawModel.applyMirror(x: boolean, y: boolean, z: boolean): void
documentation: Mirror the model for the respective axis which are set to true.

label: applyUVMirror
documentation: Set whether the respective UV axis should be mirrored.

label: setAllRenderType
documentation: Set the render type for all objects. Supported: EXTERIOR, INTERIOR, LIGHT, ALWAYS_ON_LIGHT, etc.

label: copy
documentation: Copy all vertices and material data and return a new instance of RawModel.

label: replaceTexture
documentation: Replace all textures ending with fileName to the specified Identifier.

label: replaceAllTexture
documentation: Replace all textures of this RawModel with the specified Identifier.

label: Model
documentation: Represents a model uploaded to the GPU. Vertices data can no longer be changed, but textures can be replaced.

label: replaceTexture
documentation: Replace all textures ending with fileName in the uploaded model.

label: replaceAllTexture
documentation: Replace all textures of this Model with the specified Identifier.

label: copyForMaterialChanges
documentation: Returns a new Model instance with copied materials, allowing texture replacement without affecting the original.

label: close
documentation: Close this Model instance and free up GPU resources.

label: RawMeshBuilder
documentation: Allows forming a RawMesh using code by defining vertices and materials.

label: RawMeshBuilder
detail: new RawMeshBuilder(faceSize: int, renderType: String, texture: Identifier): RawMeshBuilder
documentation: Forms a new RawMeshBuilder. faceSize specifies vertices per face (e.g., 3 for triangles).

label: vertex
documentation: Start building a vertex with the position set to pos.

label: vertex
detail: RawMeshBuilder.vertex(x: double, y: double, z: double): RawMeshBuilder
documentation: Start building a vertex with coordinates x, y, and z.

label: normal
detail: RawMeshBuilder.normal(x: double, y: double, z: double): RawMeshBuilder
documentation: Set the normal vector of the currently-building vertex.

label: uv
documentation: Set the UV value of the currently-building vertex.

label: endVertex
documentation: Finish building the current vertex and add it to the mesh.

label: color
detail: RawMeshBuilder.color(r: int, g: int, b: int, a: int): RawMeshBuilder
documentation: Set the color of the mesh in RGBA (0-255).

label: getMesh
documentation: Obtain the RawMesh, which can be appended to a RawModel.

label: DynamicModelHolder
documentation: Allows uploading models to the GPU during runtime (background threads).

label: DynamicModelHolder
documentation: Create a new instance of DynamicModelHolder.

label: uploadLater
documentation: Request a model upload. JCM will perform the upload when the next frame comes around.

label: getUploadedModel
documentation: Obtain the uploaded GPU model, or null if the upload is pending or never requested.

label: close
documentation: Close the model and free up resources.
